title: Sodium Classic Fog
description: Ports Vanilla Tweak's Classic Fog to Sodium
body:
# Sodium Classic Fog

This pack is a port of [Vanilla Tweak's](https://vanillatweaks.net/picker/resource-packs/) Classic Fog that works with Sodium, yeah that's about it idk what else to write here. It can also be used in vanilla if you wish to do so


If it shows a warning when enabling the pack, its likely because sodium got an update. You should be able to ignore this, but if it causes a crash let me know!

## ! Required Mods !

This pack requires [Sodium Shader Support](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium-core-shader-support) to function, it will not work without this mod!
